When I first lost the scholarship funding I believed I earned, the feeling was absolute despair. I questioned every decision I had ever made leading up to that moment. I began to understand that success is not defined by a single win but by resilience. Years later, facing professional stagnation, I realized how crucial patience was. The scars remained visible, but they were now proof of survival rather than defeat. I learned to respect my own journey.
